changelog:
🐛 Replaced duplicated Success-card averages with successful input/output token totals.
✨ Added managed API keys with optional custom key values, masked display, per-key token/credit limits, and usage reset.
✨ Added API-key-aware request history with masked key column, search, sort, and status filters.
✨ Made dashboard stats consistent: request, token, credit, success, and failed totals now come from final request rows in SQLite.
✨ Split account credits from app credits so Kiro server quota usage and proxy request usage are shown separately.
🛠 Improved admin UI responsiveness, compact K/M/B token display, and mobile API-key management layout.
🐛 Fixed quota checks to use raw values, fixed duplicate/missing request accounting paths, and fixed account-pool snapshot data races.
